confirm.publish.title: Confirm publish?
confirm.unpublish.title: Confirm unpublish?
confirm.publish.desc: Once published, users can discover this Bot in the app entry.
confirm.unpublish.desc: Once unpublished, this Bot will be hidden from users.
confirm.delete.title: Confirm delete?
confirm.delete.desc: This will permanently delete this Bot and clean up its IM connection. This cannot be undone.
detail.title: App Bot Details
detail.avatar.title: Click to upload avatar
detail.token.title: API Token
detail.token.rotated: Token rotated, the old token is now invalid
detail.rotate.confirm.title: Confirm token rotation?
detail.rotate.confirm.desc: The old token will be invalidated immediately, and connected OpenClaw instances will disconnect.
detail.guide.title: 🔌 Connect Guide
detail.guide.intro: Send the following to OpenClaw to bind this Bot to an Agent:
detail.guide.footer: To bind to a different Agent, change the --agent parameter. To disconnect, send /disconnect in BotFather.
detail.guide.body.line1: Bind Octo bot {{name}} to an Agent.
detail.guide.body.line2: Binds to the current Session's Agent by default; check the agent ID via /status.
detail.guide.body.line3: If the user specifies a different Agent, replace it with that ID.
create.title: Create App Bot
create.title.success: Created - Save the Token and complete binding
create.warning: The Token is shown in full only once at creation. Copy the Token and send the connect guide to OpenClaw to finish binding.
create.token.title: API Token
create.guide.title: Connect Guide
create.guide.intro: Send the following to OpenClaw to bind this Bot to an Agent:
create.guide.footer: To bind to a different Agent, change the --agent parameter. To disconnect, send /disconnect in BotFather.
form.id.label: Bot ID
form.id.extra: Unique identifier, cannot be changed after creation. e.g. octo-butler
form.displayName.label: Display name
form.description.label: Description
form.description.placeholder: An intelligent work assistant that supports...
form.welcome.label: Welcome message
form.welcome.extra: Message automatically sent on a user's first connection; leave empty to use the default prompt
form.welcome.placeholder: Hi! I'm the xx assistant. How can I help you?
